displayTitle: The High Republic (2021) Vol. 1: There is No Fear
synopsis: There is No Fear: The High Republic Volume 1 is an exciting new addition to the Star Wars Expanded Universe. Set 200 years prior to the events of the Skywalker saga, this thrilling graphic novel explores the Jedi Order at the height of its power during a time of peace and prosperity known as the High Republic.
title: The High Republic (2021) Vol. 1: There is No Fear
